goals.title: Implement /Users/neyako/Documents/hacs-amaran plans/019-test-diagnost...
goals.objective: Implement /Users/neyako/Documents/hacs-amaran plans/019-test-diagnostics-redaction.md, plans/020-test-state-store.md, plans/021-make-ruff-ci-blocking.md, and plans/022-telemetry-entities-spike.md exactly as written. Follow repo AGENTS.md: no discovery changes, no transport refactor, no startup commands, no invented battery values, use light terminology. Respect each plan STOP condition and scope. Use unittest verification, rtk uvx ruff@0.15.18 for ruff, update plans/README.md status rows when done. Do not push or open PR.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/data: implement plan 019 diagnostics-redaction tests and plan 020 state-store tests; run import checks plus targeted unittest modules from repo root.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/019-020-targeted-tests.txt captures python3 -c imports and python3 -m unittest tests.test_diagnostics -v / tests.test_state_store -v with OK output, plus git status proving no custom_components source edits for these plans.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/019-020-targeted-tests.txt: diagnostics 3 OK, state_store 7 OK, focused ruff OK, no custom_components source changes; artifact size 1908 bytes | cleanup: closed subagents 019ee4fa-133b-7f52-97dc-fccaba6f5632, 019ee4fa-13b4-7821-8ff1-1bf5bb359f24, 019ee500-6da6-77b0-bb60-7b589b1f83a0; no tmux/browser/server/port spawned

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/data: implement plan 021 by verifying ruff 0.15.18 is clean, then removing lint continue-on-error/TODO and pinning ruff==0.15.18 in .github/workflows/ci.yml lint job.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/021-ruff-ci.txt captures rtk uvx ruff@0.15.18 check ., grep checks for no continue-on-error/TODO and one ruff==0.15.18, and YAML parse or indentation confirmation.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/021-ruff-ci.txt: ruff@0.15.18 All checks passed, no continue-on-error, no TODO(advisor-006), one ruff==0.15.18, YAML parsed ok; artifact size 930 bytes | cleanup: closed subagent 019ee4fa-13ee-7af1-965d-6f1400263dd8; no tmux/browser/server/port spawned

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/data: implement plan 022 docs-only telemetry design, update plan index rows for 019-022, and run final full unittest suite plus artifact existence/section checks.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/022-final-regression.txt captures docs/telemetry-design.md exists with at least seven ## sections, git status scoped to expected files, and python3 -m unittest discover -s tests OK.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/022-final-regression.txt: telemetry doc exists with 7 sections and required claims, 019-022 index rows DONE, protected custom_components source status clean, full unittest discover 188 tests OK under uvx --with cryptography; artifact size 6954 bytes; note suite prints pre-existing async task warning but exits OK | cleanup: closed subagent 019ee4fa-1449-7581-a402-1cbeae008dae; no tmux/browser/server/port spawned
